title: Declarative Management of Kubernetes Objects Using Configuration Files — Migrating from imperative object configuration to declarative object configuration
text:
Set the
kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration
annotation on the object:
kubectl replace --save-config -f <kind>_<name>.yaml
Change processes to use
kubectl apply
for managing the object exclusively.
Set the
kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration
annotation on the object:
kubectl replace --save-config -f <kind>_<name>.yaml
Change processes to use
kubectl apply
for managing the object exclusively.
